mapper.insert:
SELECT MAX(hotelNo) FROM hotel
insert into hotel(hotelNo,hotelName,mainAddress,address,hotelPhoneNo,hotelRegistDate, buffet,swim,golf,pet,restaurant,fitness,parking,wifi,kitchen,smoke,memberNo) values (hotel_seq.nextval,#{hotelName},#{mainAddress},#{address},#{hotelPhoneNo},sysdate, #{buffet},#{swim},#{golf},#{pet},#{restaurant},#{fitness},#{parking},#{wifi},#{kitchen},#{smoke},#{memberNo})
mapper.select: select t.* from (select h.hotelNo, i.hotelFileName, h.hotelName, h.mainAddress, h.hotelPhoneNo, h.hotelRegistDate, m.memberNickname from hotel h JOIN hotel_image i ON h.hotelNo = i.hotelNo LEFT JOIN member m ON h.memberNo = m.memberNo order by h.hotelRegistDate desc) t where rownum<5

select t.* from (select i.realuser,i.checkindate,i.checkoutdate,i.useramount, t.realhotelName, t.state, h.hotelPhoneNo,r.roomname,r.roomprice from hotel h, reservation i,hotel_room r,realhotel t where h.hotelNo = r.hotelNo and i.roomno=r.roomno and h.realhotelno = t.realhotelno order by h.hotelRegistDate desc) t where rownum<5

select t.* from (select r.grade,r.reviewcontent,r.report,r.reviewdate, m.membernickname from member m, review r where m.memberNo = r.memberNo and r.report='t' order by r.reviewdate desc) t where rownum<5

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hotel h
(h.hotelName LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR h.mainAddress LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR h.address LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
mapper.insert: insert into hotel_image(hotelImageId, hotelNo, hotelFileName) values (hotel_image_seq.nextval, #{hotelNo}, #{hotelFileName})
